---
name: Security report (use the private channel instead!)
about: Use GitHub's "Report a vulnerability" button — DO NOT use this template
title: 'Please use private disclosure'
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

**Please do not file security reports as public issues.**

Use GitHub's **"Report a vulnerability"** button under the
*Security* → *Advisories* tab on this repository, or email the
maintainer listed on the GitHub profile.

See [`SECURITY.md`](../../SECURITY.md) for the full disclosure policy.

If you're filing a public issue because you're certain the bug is not
exploitable, please mark it clearly and use the regular bug template
instead.
